title: celtis ferruginea
intro: Celtis ferruginea, also known as the nettle tree or red stem nettle, is a plant species in the elm family that is native to Africa. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its various medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Celtis ferruginea include its ability to treat conditions such as fever, rheumatism, and gastrointestinal issues, making it a valuable remedy for various ailments. In herbal preparations, Celtis ferruginea is often used in teas, infusions, and tinctures, and its leaves and bark are also used to make topical treatments for skin conditions.
